use_cases: Main site navigation for landing pages and marketing sites
Responsive header navigation with mobile hamburger menu support
Top navigation for SaaS dashboards and project documentation sites
ai_summary: A responsive top navigation bar featuring a gradient logo with hover rotation animation, smooth scale effects on navigation links, and a mobile-friendly hamburger menu toggle. The component uses motion/react for fluid animations and includes a pill-shaped container with shadow styling, making it suitable for modern SaaS and e-commerce landing pages.
